message:
Running command: # Good! --from flag is available. We'll use --from OpenROAD.DetailedRouting
# But first verify the step ID by checking the LibreLane flow steps
/home/user/.nix-profile/bin/librelane \
    /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/config.json \
    --only Yosys.JsonHeader \
    --run-tag pnr_check_steps \
    --flow-name Classic \
    2>&1 | grep -E "Steps|Step " | head -30 || true

# Check what the next step IDs are after GlobalRouting
grep -r "GlobalRouting\|DetailedRouting\|DRT\|TritonRoute" \
    /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages/librelane/flows/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v ".pyc" | grep "class\|id\|DRT\|GlobalRout" | head -10
